manifest.author: xauravww

manifest.author: Eric N. Garcia
manifest.name: Encrypted Folders
manifest.description: Encrypt and decrypt entire folders within your vault with AES-256-GCM.

manifest.author: powen

manifest.author: Rasbandit
manifest.name: Engram Vault Sync

manifest.author: RobertttBS
manifest.name: Enhanced Canvas

manifest.author: Mara-Li

manifest.description: Copy your selection and add it some edit to paste in other markdown software. Allows to keep markdown in reading view, removing wikilinks in editing, copy from locked canvas, and more!
